calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Oct-28-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a Minor.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: William Gargano, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689
Petitioner: Li Tan, present in pro per as Guardian ad litem for the Minor: Qi Jie Situ,
and with Cantonese Interpreter Shuna Li.
Petitioner and Interpreter were sworn and examined.
No appearance by Co-Petitioner/Minor's Father: Jian Situ, but consented and signed the Petition for the Name Change of the Minor.
No objections to the proposed change of name of the minor were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.
The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of a Minor to: Henry Situ.
Decree signed in open court.
